# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_regions (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances regions of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all regions of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_regions" "all" {}

output "region_names" {
  value = [for r in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_regions.all.regions : r.name]
}

# Only the enabled regions.
output "enabled_regions" {
  value = [for r in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_regions.all.regions : r.name if r.is_enabled]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `regions` (List of Object) The list of regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `az_count` (Number)
- `country_code` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `geography` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_enabled` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
